title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMAeroway
description: An aeroway feature from OpenStreetMap tagged with aeroway=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMAeroway

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

aerowayType.description: Property. The OSM aeroway tag classifying the feature. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:aeroway'

surface.description: Property. Physical surface of the runway, taxiway, or apron. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:surface'

lengthMeters.description: Property. Length of the feature (such as a runway) in metres. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:length'

widthMeters.description: Property. Width of the feature in metres. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:width'

ref.description: Property. Reference code (like runway number or gate number). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ref'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources about this item.
